# DoneOne Robots.txt
# https://doneone.in/robots.txt

# Allow all web crawlers
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://doneone.in/sitemap.xml

# Disallow admin and private routes
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /*.json$

# Allow specific assets
Allow: /logo.png
Allow: /og-image.png
Allow: /guide/

# Crawl-delay for polite crawling
Crawl-delay: 1
